; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-05-06T23:17:34Z
; Requires qt-command-executor

AFFECT [[12599552112012170435]]
    IMPORT net.asivery.CommandExecutor [[180922.180921]]

    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]]#[[7713561876955258]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            property ~&197088788&~ _btIndex: 99
        }

        TRAVERSE ?#[[4442117794842111784]]
            LOCATE AFTER [[7712155293725601]]#[[4419331897656319922]]
            INSERT {
                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&452264033555071090&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: btSidebarItem
                    ~&6504337259&~: ~&254477762679831355&~.~&233703109346403&~.~&233740920352621&~
                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&8400072892861785085&~ ? ~&6504222003&~("Bluetooth") : ""
                    ~&8399601734642709923&~: "qrc:/ark/icons/bluetooth"
                    ~&484431552542639914&~: ~&7713561876955258&~.~&17776274328933340866&~ === ~&7713561876955258&~._btIndex
                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                    ~&495358363329399331&~: {
                        ~&7713561876955258&~.~&17776274328933340866&~ = ~&7713561876955258&~._btIndex;
                        ~&16542060515769262500&~.~&233743626668842&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
                    }
                }
            }
        END TRAVERSE


        TRAVERSE [[7081645463424]]#[[5556919789846348618]]
            REBUILD [[16021043814775702381]]
                LOCATE BEFORE STREAM / default: ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504117156&~; /
                INSERT STREAM / ~&6503700293&~ 99: ~&7083121450889&~ bluetoothPage; /
            END REBUILD
        END TRAVERSE

        LOCATE AFTER [[254480451320573660]]#[[6503884114]]
        INSERT {
            ~&254480451320573660&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: bluetoothPage

                ~&6502786168&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: btRoot

                    ~&254501108490678590&~ {
                        ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                        ~&214622605608&~: ~&"233641003890000&~
                    }

                    CommandExecutor {
                        ~&5972374&~: btExec
                    }

                    ~&7712130752583461&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: bt
                        property ~&6503679477&~ driverLoaded: ~&214625660372&~
                        property ~&6503679477&~ powered: ~&214625660372&~
                        property ~&6503679477&~ enabling: ~&214625660372&~
                        property ~&6503679477&~ scanning: ~&214625660372&~
                        property ~&6503679477&~ ~&233740255239187&~: ~&214625660372&~
                        property ~&7083178290016&~ pairingMac: ""
                        property ~&7083178290016&~ pairingPin: ""
                        property ~&6503679477&~ showPinOverlay: ~&214625660372&~
                        property ~&197102514&~ pairedDevices: []
                        property ~&197102514&~ discoveredDevices: []

                        function exec(cmd) {
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&180987&~ = ~&6502785411&~.parse(btExec.executeCommand("/bin/sh", ["-c", "unset NOTIFY_SOCKET; " + cmd]));
                            ~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("BT exec: " + cmd + " => " + ~&180987&~.stdout.~&6504329413&~());
                            ~&7083121450889&~ ~&180987&~;
                        }

                        function refreshState() {
                            ~&197102514&~ lsmod = exec("lsmod | grep -c btnxpuart || echo 0").stdout.~&6504329413&~();
                            driverLoaded = (~&7713428776113935&~(lsmod) > 0);

                            ~&5972376&~ (driverLoaded) {
                                ~&197102514&~ pwr = exec("bluetoothctl show 2>/dev/null | grep 'Powered:'").stdout;
                                powered = pwr.~&233731717342038&~(~&"197105914&~) !== -1;
                            } ~&6503784146&~ {
                                powered = ~&214625660372&~;
                            }

                            ~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("BT state: driver=" + driverLoaded + " powered=" + powered);

                            ~&5972376&~ (powered) {
                                refreshPairedDevices();
                            } ~&6503784146&~ {
                                pairedDevices = [];
                                discoveredDevices = [];
                            }
                        }

                        function parseDeviceLines(output) {
                            ~&197102514&~ lines = output.~&214641616085&~("\n");
                            ~&197102514&~ devices = [];
                            ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < lines.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                                ~&197102514&~ ~&180982&~ = lines[~&180978&~].~&214633970006&~(/^Device\~&180988&~+([0-9~&180938&~-Fa-f:]{17})\~&180988&~+(.+)$/);
                                ~&5972376&~ (~&180982&~) {
                                    devices.~&6504189257&~({ mac: ~&180982&~[1], ~&6504095402&~: ~&180982&~[2] });
                                }
                            }
                            ~&7083121450889&~ devices;
                        }

                        function refreshPairedDevices() {
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&7083121414760&~ = exec("bluetoothctl devices Paired 2>/dev/null");
                            ~&197102514&~ devices = parseDeviceLines(~&7083121414760&~.stdout);
                            ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < devices.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                                ~&197102514&~ ~&6503929653&~ = exec("bluetoothctl info " + devices[~&180978&~].mac + " 2>/dev/null").stdout;
                                devices[~&180978&~].connected = ~&6503929653&~.~&233731717342038&~("Connected: yes") !== -1;
                                ~&197102514&~ battMatch = ~&6503929653&~.~&214633970006&~(/~&233680860825412&~ Percentage: 0~&180993&~[0-9~&180970&~-fA-~&180943&~]+ \((\~&180973&~+)\)/);
                                devices[~&180978&~].~&233722187800420&~ = battMatch ? ~&7713428776113935&~(battMatch[1]) : -1;
                            }
                            pairedDevices = devices;
                        }

                        function refreshDiscoveredDevices() {
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&7083121414760&~ = exec("bluetoothctl devices 2>/dev/null");
                            ~&197102514&~ all = parseDeviceLines(~&7083121414760&~.stdout);
                            ~&197102514&~ pairedMacs = {};
                            ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < pairedDevices.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                                pairedMacs[pairedDevices[~&180978&~].mac] = ~&6504329801&~;
                            }
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&7713658557983137&~ = [];
                            ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180979&~ = 0; ~&180979&~ < all.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180979&~++) {
                                ~&5972376&~ (!pairedMacs[all[~&180979&~].mac] && !all[~&180979&~].~&6504095402&~.~&214633970006&~(/^[0-9~&180938&~-Fa-f]{2}[-:]/)) {
                                    ~&7713658557983137&~.~&6504189257&~(all[~&180979&~]);
                                }
                            }
                            discoveredDevices = ~&7713658557983137&~;
                        }

                        function writeUdevRules() {
                            ~&197102514&~ cmd = "printf '";
                            ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < pairedDevices.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                                ~&197102514&~ n = pairedDevices[~&180978&~].~&6504095402&~;
                                cmd += "SUBSYSTEM==\\042input\\042, KERNEL==\\042event*\\042, ATTRS{name}==\\042" + n + " *\\042, ACTION==\\042add\\042, RUN+=\\042/bin/sh -c \\047echo bt.%%k >> /sys/power/wake_lock\\047\\042\\n";
                                cmd += "SUBSYSTEM==\\042input\\042, KERNEL==\\042event*\\042, ATTRS{name}==\\042" + n + " *\\042, ACTION==\\042remove\\042, RUN+=\\042/bin/sh -c \\047echo bt.%%k >> /sys/power/wake_unlock\\047\\042\\n";
                            }
                            cmd += "' > /etc/udev/rules.d/99-bt-wakelock.rules && udevadm control --reload";
                            exec(cmd);
                        }

                        function clearUdevRules() {
                            exec("rm -f /etc/udev/rules.d/99-bt-wakelock.rules; udevadm control --reload; for l in $(cat /sys/power/wake_lock); do case $l in bt.*) echo $l > /sys/power/wake_unlock;; esac; done; true");
                        }

                        function enableBluetooth() {
                            powered = ~&6504329801&~;
                            enabling = ~&6504329801&~;
                            ~&5972376&~ (!driverLoaded) {
                                exec("modprobe btnxpuart");
                            }
                            exec("chmod 755 /etc/bluetooth 2>/dev/null; true");
                            enablePollTimer.ticks = 0;
                            enablePollTimer.~&233743626668842&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
                        }

                        function disableBluetooth() {
                            enablePollTimer.~&233743626668842&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                            enabling = ~&214625660372&~;
                            scanTimer.~&233743626668842&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                            scanning = ~&214625660372&~;
                            powered = ~&214625660372&~;
                            exec("bluetoothctl power off");
                            clearUdevRules();
                            refreshState();
                        }

                        function startScan() {
                            ~&5972376&~ (!powered) ~&7083121450889&~;
                            scanning = ~&6504329801&~;
                            discoveredDevices = [];
                            exec("sh -c 'bluetoothctl --timeout 15 scan on >/dev/null 2>&1 &'");
                            scanTimer.~&233743626668842&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
                            scanStopTimer.~&233743626668842&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
                        }

                        function stopScan() {
                            scanning = ~&214625660372&~;
                            scanTimer.~&233743626668842&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                            scanStopTimer.~&233743626668842&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                            exec("bluetoothctl scan off 2>/dev/null; true");
                        }

                        function connectDevice(mac) {
                            exec("timeout 5 bluetoothctl connect " + mac + " 2>/dev/null; true");
                            refreshPairedDevices();
                        }

                        function disconnectDevice(mac) {
                            exec("bluetoothctl disconnect " + mac);
                            refreshPairedDevices();
                        }

                        function removeDevice(mac) {
                            exec("bluetoothctl remove " + mac);
                            refreshState();
                            writeUdevRules();
                        }

                        function pairDevice(mac) {
                            ~&233740255239187&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
                            pairingMac = mac;
                            pairingPin = "";
                            showPinOverlay = ~&214625660372&~;

                            exec("sh -c 'rm -f /tmp/bt-pair-status; { echo \"agent on\"; echo \"default-agent\"; echo \"pairable on\"; sleep 1; echo \"pair " + mac + "\"; sleep 30; } | bluetoothctl 2>&1 | while IFS= read -r line; do case \"$line\" in *Passkey*|*PIN\\ code*) pin=$(echo \"$line\" | grep -oE \"[0-9]{4,6}\"); echo \"pin:$pin\" > /tmp/bt-pair-status;; *successful*) echo \"success\" > /tmp/bt-pair-status;; *Failed*|*error*) echo \"failed\" > /tmp/bt-pair-status;; esac; done &'");

                            pairPollTimer.~&233743626668842&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
                        }

                        function finishPairing(success) {
                            pairPollTimer.~&233743626668842&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                            ~&233740255239187&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                            showPinOverlay = ~&214625660372&~;
                            pairingPin = "";

                            ~&5972376&~ (success) {
                                exec("bluetoothctl trust " + pairingMac);
                                exec("bluetoothctl connect " + pairingMac);
                            }
                            pairingMac = "";
                            refreshState();
                            ~&5972376&~ (success) writeUdevRules();
                        }
                    }

                    ~&214604601930&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: enablePollTimer
                        ~&7713147298280334&~: 1000
                        ~&7083121289162&~: ~&6504329801&~
                        property ~&197088788&~ ticks: 0
                        ~&495358363329399331&~: {
                            ticks++;
                            ~&197102514&~ pwr = bt.exec("bluetoothctl show 2>/dev/null | grep 'Powered:'").stdout;
                            ~&5972376&~ (pwr.~&233731717342038&~(~&"197105914&~) !== -1) {
                                ~&233743626668842&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                                bt.enabling = ~&214625660372&~;
                                bt.refreshState();
                                bt.writeUdevRules();
                                reconnectRefreshTimer.~&233743626668842&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
                                ~&7083121450889&~;
                            }
                            bt.exec("bluetoothctl power on 2>/dev/null; true");
                            bt.exec("bluetoothctl pairable on 2>/dev/null; true");
                            ~&5972376&~ (ticks >= 10) {
                                ~&233743626668842&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                                bt.enabling = ~&214625660372&~;
                                bt.exec("rmmod btnxpuart 2>/dev/null; true");
                                bt.refreshState();
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    ~&214604601930&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: reconnectRefreshTimer
                        ~&7713147298280334&~: 3000
                        ~&7083121289162&~: ~&214625660372&~
                        ~&495358363329399331&~: bt.refreshState()
                    }

                    ~&214604601930&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: statusPollTimer
                        ~&7713147298280334&~: 3000
                        ~&7083121289162&~: ~&6504329801&~
                        ~&233743626668842&~: bt.powered && !bt.enabling && !bt.scanning && btRoot.~&233748328658231&~
                        ~&495358363329399331&~: bt.refreshPairedDevices()
                    }

                    ~&214604601930&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: scanTimer
                        ~&7713147298280334&~: 2000
                        ~&7083121289162&~: ~&6504329801&~
                        ~&495358363329399331&~: {
                            bt.refreshPairedDevices();
                            bt.refreshDiscoveredDevices();
                        }
                    }

                    ~&214604601930&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: scanStopTimer
                        ~&7713147298280334&~: 16000
                        ~&7083121289162&~: ~&214625660372&~
                        ~&495358363329399331&~: bt.stopScan()
                    }

                    ~&214604601930&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: pairPollTimer
                        ~&7713147298280334&~: 1500
                        ~&7083121289162&~: ~&6504329801&~
                        property ~&197088788&~ ticks: 0
                        ~&495358363329399331&~: {
                            ticks++;
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&7083121414760&~ = bt.exec("cat /tmp/bt-pair-status 2>/dev/null").stdout.~&6504329413&~();
                            ~&5972376&~ (~&7083121414760&~.~&233731717342038&~("pin:") === 0) {
                                bt.pairingPin = ~&7083121414760&~.~&254548200562243306&~(4);
                                bt.showPinOverlay = ~&6504329801&~;
                            } ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&7083121414760&~ === "success") {
                                bt.finishPairing(~&6504329801&~);
                                ticks = 0;
                            } ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&7083121414760&~.~&233731717342038&~(~&"7082646676942&~) === 0) {
                                bt.finishPairing(~&214625660372&~);
                                ticks = 0;
                            }
                            ~&5972376&~ (ticks > 25) {
                                bt.finishPairing(~&214625660372&~);
                                ticks = 0;
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    ~&254480451320573660&~.~&495334332051582499&~: bt.refreshState()

                    ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7179807676896158689&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: btPlaceholder
                        ~&233721384511543&~ {
                            ~&197100796&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&197100796&~
                            ~&6504027668&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
                            ~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
                        }
                    }

                    ~&14125623155555875541&~ {
                        ~&233721384511543&~ {
                            ~&197100796&~: btPlaceholder.~&7082507142622&~
                            ~&6504027668&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
                            ~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
                            ~&7082507142622&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082507142622&~
                            ~&8399743405844438450&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7082920942823&~.~&8399572322985746835&~.~&214632782036&~
                            ~&499747351624466981&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7082920942823&~.~&8399572322985746835&~.~&214632782036&~
                            ~&15692798426932296956&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7082920942823&~.~&7713689654001219&~.~&214632782036&~
                        }
                        ~&233744706647566&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&214632782036&~

                        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214604609771&~ {
                            ~&6504337259&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214604609771&~.~&214594832564&~
                            ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Bluetooth settings")
                            ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                        }

                        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214599571833&~ {
                            ~&214632764553&~: ~&6504222003&~("Bluetooth")
                            ~&8399601734642709923&~: "qrc:/ark/icons/bluetooth"
                            ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                            ~&7082453764199&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7081958765675&~ {
                                ~&233723734822480&~: bt.powered
                                ~&254494525842443467&~ {
                                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&233736391113274&~: -20
                                    ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                                        ~&5972376&~ (bt.powered) {
                                            bt.disableBluetooth();
                                        } ~&6503784146&~ {
                                            bt.enableBluetooth();
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        ~&6502786168&~ {
                            ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                            ~&7081629735527&~.~&8399470807760157065&~: ~&6504329801&~
                            ~&233748328658231&~: !bt.powered
                        }

                        ~&14125623155555875541&~ {
                            ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                            ~&7081629735527&~.~&551578482555648288&~: 300
                            ~&233748328658231&~: bt.powered && !bt.enabling && bt.pairedDevices.~&7082886407723&~ > 0
                            ~&233744706647566&~: 0

                            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214604609771&~ {
                                ~&6504337259&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214604609771&~.~&7081672853386&~
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Paired devices")
                            }

                            ~&17555155952404031931&~ {
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&8399470807760157065&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&10031540993547567188&~: ~&6504329801&~

                                ~&6504391364&~: ~&7711904883727328&~ {
                                    ~&5972374&~: btPairedList
                                    ~&233744706647566&~: 0
                                    ~&486213351838023143&~: ~&214625660372&~
                                    ~&6503711953&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                    ~&214634455770&~: bt.pairedDevices

                                    ~&7712922269353028&~: ~&7081293658967&~ {
                                        required property ~&197102514&~ ~&254539508423767444&~
                                        ~&214646099849&~: btPairedList.~&214646099849&~ - 35
                                        property ~&197102514&~ ~&7082573613689&~: ~&254539508423767444&~
                                        property ~&6503679477&~ showActions: ~&214625660372&~

                                        ~&6502786168&~ {
                                            ~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
                                            ~&7082729686082&~: pairedRow.~&2122835675838176157&~ + ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&214641496386&~ * 2

                                            ~&254501558939456351&~ {
                                                ~&5972374&~: pairedRow
                                                ~&233721384511543&~ {
                                                    ~&6504027668&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
                                                    ~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
                                                    ~&3441383163516681764&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&3441383163516681764&~
                                                }
                                                ~&6503165774&~ {
                                                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&7082573613689&~.~&6504095402&~
                                                    ~&6503823200&~.~&254543497768871654&~: 32
                                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                                    ~&214624865996&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&8397943310926068554&~
                                                }
                                                ~&6503165774&~ {
                                                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&7082573613689&~.connected ? ~&6504222003&~("Connected") : ~&6504222003&~(~&"14167275439765148284&~)
                                                    ~&6503823200&~.~&254543497768871654&~: 28
                                                    ~&233748328658231&~: ~&7082573613689&~.~&233722187800420&~ < 0
                                                }
                                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&425879045292885197&~ {
                                                    ~&214644635174&~: ~&7082573613689&~.~&233722187800420&~ >= 0 ? ~&7082573613689&~.~&233722187800420&~ : 0
                                                    ~&233748328658231&~: ~&7082573613689&~.~&233722187800420&~ >= 0
                                                }
                                            }

                                            ~&254494525842443467&~ {
                                                ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                                                ~&254542236275632405&~: showActions = !showActions
                                            }
                                        }

                                        ~&7081645463424&~ {
                                            ~&7082453764421&~: showActions
                                            ~&233721384511543&~ {
                                                ~&6504027668&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
                                                ~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
                                                ~&8399743405844438450&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7082920942823&~.~&8399572322985746835&~.~&7083372592602&~
                                                ~&499747351624466981&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7082920942823&~.~&8399572322985746835&~.~&7083372592602&~
                                            }
                                            ~&16021043814775702381&~: ~&254501558939456351&~ {
                                                ~&233744706647566&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&7082925185962&~
                                                ~&6502786168&~ { ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~ }
                                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
                                                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~(~&"7081411265264&~)
                                                    ~&6504337259&~: ~&254477762679831355&~.~&7081261925573&~.~&254547519794454865&~
                                                    ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                                                        showActions = ~&214625660372&~;
                                                        bt.removeDevice(~&7082573613689&~.mac);
                                                    }
                                                }
                                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
                                                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&7082573613689&~.connected ? ~&6504222003&~(~&"8397893105533510739&~) : ~&6504222003&~(~&"233682692857235&~)
                                                    ~&6504337259&~: ~&254477762679831355&~.~&7081261925573&~.~&233740920352621&~
                                                    ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                                                        showActions = ~&214625660372&~;
                                                        ~&5972376&~ (~&7082573613689&~.connected) {
                                                            bt.disconnectDevice(~&7082573613689&~.mac);
                                                        } ~&6503784146&~ {
                                                            bt.connectDevice(~&7082573613689&~.mac);
                                                        }
                                                    }
                                                }
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        ~&14125623155555875541&~ {
                            ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                            ~&7081629735527&~.~&8399470807760157065&~: ~&6504329801&~
                            ~&233748328658231&~: bt.powered

                            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214604609771&~ {
                                ~&6504337259&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214604609771&~.~&7081672853386&~
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&6504315758&~: {
                                    ~&5972376&~ (bt.enabling) {
                                        ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504222003&~("Starting Bluetooth...");
                                    }
                                    ~&5972376&~ (bt.discoveredDevices.~&7082886407723&~ === 0 && bt.scanning) {
                                        ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504222003&~("Searching for devices...");
                                    }
                                    ~&5972376&~ (bt.discoveredDevices.~&7082886407723&~ === 0) {
                                        ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504222003&~("Tap Scan to find nearby devices");
                                    }
                                    ~&7083121450889&~ bt.scanning ? ~&6504222003&~("Scanning...") : ~&6504222003&~("Available devices");
                                }
                            }

                            ~&17555155952404031931&~ {
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&8399470807760157065&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&10031540993547567188&~: ~&6504329801&~

                                ~&6504391364&~: ~&7711904883727328&~ {
                                    ~&5972374&~: btDeviceList
                                    ~&233744706647566&~: 0
                                    ~&486213351838023143&~: ~&214625660372&~
                                    ~&6503711953&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                    ~&214634455770&~: bt.discoveredDevices

                                    ~&7712922269353028&~: ~&7081293658967&~ {
                                        required property ~&197102514&~ ~&254539508423767444&~
                                        ~&214646099849&~: btDeviceList.~&214646099849&~ - 35
                                        property ~&197102514&~ ~&7082573613689&~: ~&254539508423767444&~
                                        property ~&6503679477&~ showActions: ~&214625660372&~

                                        ~&6502786168&~ {
                                            ~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
                                            ~&7082729686082&~: discRow.~&2122835675838176157&~ + ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&214641496386&~ * 2

                                            ~&254501558939456351&~ {
                                                ~&5972374&~: discRow
                                                ~&233721384511543&~ {
                                                    ~&6504027668&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
                                                    ~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
                                                    ~&3441383163516681764&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&3441383163516681764&~
                                                }
                                                ~&6503165774&~ {
                                                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&7082573613689&~.~&6504095402&~
                                                    ~&6503823200&~.~&254543497768871654&~: 32
                                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                                    ~&214624865996&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&8397943310926068554&~
                                                }
                                                ~&6503165774&~ {
                                                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&7082573613689&~.mac
                                                    ~&6503823200&~.~&254543497768871654&~: 28
                                                    ~&15450610953915458578&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&8397757669215083186&~
                                                    ~&214622605608&~: "#666666"
                                                }
                                            }

                                            ~&254494525842443467&~ {
                                                ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                                                ~&254542236275632405&~: showActions = !showActions
                                            }
                                        }

                                        ~&7081645463424&~ {
                                            ~&7082453764421&~: showActions
                                            ~&233721384511543&~ {
                                                ~&6504027668&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
                                                ~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
                                                ~&8399743405844438450&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7082920942823&~.~&8399572322985746835&~.~&7083372592602&~
                                                ~&499747351624466981&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7082920942823&~.~&8399572322985746835&~.~&7083372592602&~
                                            }
                                            ~&16021043814775702381&~: ~&254501558939456351&~ {
                                                ~&233744706647566&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&7082925185962&~
                                                ~&6502786168&~ { ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~ }
                                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
                                                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~(~&"6503017173&~)
                                                    ~&6504337259&~: ~&254477762679831355&~.~&7081261925573&~.~&233740920352621&~
                                                    ~&233726547792244&~: !bt.~&233740255239187&~
                                                    ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                                                        showActions = ~&214625660372&~;
                                                        bt.pairDevice(~&7082573613689&~.mac);
                                                    }
                                                }
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
                            ~&6504315758&~: bt.scanning ? ~&6504222003&~("Stop scanning") : ~&6504222003&~("Scan for devices")
                            ~&6504337259&~: ~&254477762679831355&~.~&7081261925573&~.~&254547519794454865&~
                            ~&214646099849&~: ~&12921149980962105220&~
                            ~&7081629735527&~.~&254522510204479688&~: ~&5971598&~.~&8397757669215083186&~
                            ~&233748328658231&~: bt.powered && !bt.enabling
                            ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                                ~&5972376&~ (bt.scanning) {
                                    bt.stopScan();
                                } ~&6503784146&~ {
                                    bt.startScan();
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    ~&254501108490678590&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: pinOverlay
                        ~&233748328658231&~: bt.showPinOverlay
                        ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                        ~&214622605608&~: "#cc000000"
                        ~&180995&~: 100

                        ~&254494525842443467&~ {
                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                            ~&254542236275632405&~: {}
                        }

                        ~&254501108490678590&~ {
                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&7712879746914881&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                            ~&214646099849&~: 700
                            ~&7082729686082&~: pinColumn.~&2122835675838176157&~ + 120
                            ~&7083116119249&~: 16
                            ~&214622605608&~: ~&"233641003890000&~

                            ~&14125623155555875541&~ {
                                ~&5972374&~: pinColumn
                                ~&233721384511543&~ {
                                    ~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                                    ~&233736391113274&~: 60
                                }
                                ~&233744706647566&~: 40

                                ~&6503165774&~ {
                                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Enter PIN on your keyboard")
                                    ~&6503823200&~.~&254543497768871654&~: 36
                                    ~&6503823200&~.~&6503679370&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                    ~&15450610953915458578&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&14019785274593562237&~
                                }

                                ~&6503165774&~ {
                                    ~&6504315758&~: bt.pairingPin
                                    ~&6503823200&~.~&254543497768871654&~: 72
                                    ~&6503823200&~.~&6503679370&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                    ~&15450610953915458578&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&14019785274593562237&~
                                    ~&6503823200&~.~&7082646817675&~: "monospace"
                                }

                                ~&6503165774&~ {
                                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Type the code above on the keyboard, then press Enter")
                                    ~&6503823200&~.~&254543497768871654&~: 28
                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                    ~&15450610953915458578&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&14019785274593562237&~
                                    ~&7713748390489352&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&7712381377343359&~
                                    ~&214622605608&~: "#666666"
                                }

                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
                                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~(~&"7081277108079&~)
                                    ~&6504337259&~: ~&254477762679831355&~.~&7081261925573&~.~&254547519794454865&~
                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254522510204479688&~: ~&5971598&~.~&14019785274593562237&~
                                    ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                                        bt.exec("bluetoothctl cancel-pairing " + bt.pairingMac + " 2>/dev/null; true");
                                        bt.finishPairing(~&214625660372&~);
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
